title: Daily Operations
description: Live portfolio performance dashboard covering occupancy, financial performance, rental activity, and trend analysis across all 164 properties. Powered by the Lodestar semantic model.
author: 10 Federal Team

title: Base Metric Explorer
description: Single-metric deep-dive showing monthly trend, KPIs, and prior-month / prior-year comparisons. Supports all Lodestar base metrics with cascading Owner → Property filters.
author: 10 Federal Team
